must_detect.matched_text: Regulation FD Addendum: employees must not selectively disclose material nonpublic information to sell-side analysts, lenders, or rating advisors; covered topics include unannounced earnings, trial endpoints, or model loss rates.

Lakeshore Health & Finance Corp. US Privacy and Reg FD Notice
This notice covers processing of personal information under a US patchwork (CCPA-like standards for consumer/household data; HIPAA for patients; GLBA for financial accounts).
We process contact details, device logs, and customer service metadata for the PulseBridge Portal and VistaLedger Core; we do not collect biometric templates, genetic profiles, or union membership records for marketing.
Intentional special-category example: Patient Case “Blue-204” includes a disclosed Type 1 diabetes condition used solely for care coordination and claims; access is restricted and audited.
For DSARs (access, deletion, correction), contact privacy@lshf.example.com or 833-000-4242; we verify via ticket IDs (e.g., REQ-17A-0000) and will not ask for Social Security numbers or account PINs.
GLBA-covered financial records and HIPAA-protected medical records may be exempt from certain state rights, but non-exempt data will be fulfilled within 45 days where permitted by law.
Our Retention Schedule Maple-7 keeps bank statement images for 7 years and clinical audit logs for 10 years, after which files are de-identified or securely destroyed.
Sponsorships (e.g., River City Rockets youth night, Redwood County Wellness Fair) collect only aggregate attendance stats; no precise geolocation is stored.
Regulation FD Addendum: employees must not selectively disclose material nonpublic information to sell-side analysts, lenders, or rating advisors; covered topics include unannounced earnings, trial endpoints, or model loss rates.
